_meta.purpose: DAX query patterns for Qwen Coder 14B — ready-to-use DAX templates for all common collection portfolio questions. Qwen should use these patterns when generating DAX and adapt them with user's slicer selections.
dax_rules: Use DISTINCTCOUNT for customer-level metrics — NEVER plain COUNT
Use COUNT or COUNTROWS for loan-level metrics
Use DIVIDE instead of / to handle division by zero
Date filters use DATESINPERIOD or direct value comparison
String comparisons are case-sensitive in DAX — use exact values from this JSON
NULL values: use ISBLANK() or check field-specific rules in business_logic.json

bounce_count.description: Count of customers who bounced (Tech or Non Tech)
bounce_count.with_branch_filter:
EVALUATE
ROW(
  "Bounce Count",
  CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
    Final TableTable[Bounce status] IN {"Tech", "Non Tech"},
    Final Table[Branch] = "{BRANCH_VALUE}"
  )
)

bounce_by_branch.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Table[Branch],
  "Bounce Count", CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Table[Cust ID]),
    Table[Bounce status] IN {"Tech", "Non Tech"}
  ),
  "Total Customers", DISTINCTCOUNT(Table[Cust ID]),
  "Bounce %", DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Table[Cust ID]), Table[Bounce status] IN {"Tech", "Non Tech"}),
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Table[Cust ID])
  ) * 100
)
ORDER BY [Bounce Count] DESC

bounce_tech_vs_nontech.description: Bounce count split by Tech vs Non Tech by branch
bounce_tech_vs_nontech.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Branch],
  Final Table[Bounce status],
  FILTER(Final Table, Final Table[Bounce status] IN {"Tech", "Non Tech"}),
  "Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
)

resolution_count.dax:
EVALUATE
ROW(
  "Resolution Count",
  CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
    Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm"
  )
)

resolution_percent.dax:
EVALUATE
ROW(
  "Resolution %",
  DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm"),
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
  ) * 100
)

resolution_by_branch.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Branch],
  "Resolution %", DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm"),
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
  ) * 100,
  "Resolved Count", CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm"),
  "Total Customers", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
)
ORDER BY [Resolution %] DESC

bucket_distribution.description: Count and outstanding by Op bucket
bucket_distribution.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Op bucket],
  "Loan Count", COUNT(Final Table[loanappno]),
  "Customer Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
  "Balance Principal", SUM(Final Table[bal_prin]),
  "Total Overdue", SUM(Final Table[TOD])
)
ORDER BY [Loan Count] DESC

bucket_movement_matrix.description: Opening bucket vs Closing bucket movement matrix
bucket_movement_matrix.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Op bucket],
  Final Table[Closing bucket],
  "Loan Count", COUNT(Final Table[loanappno]),
  "Customer Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
)

cust_wise_status_summary.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Cust wise status],
  "Customer Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
  "Loan Count", COUNT(Final Table[loanappno])
)
ORDER BY [Customer Count] DESC

coverage_percent.dax:
EVALUATE
ROW(
  "Coverage %",
  DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(
      DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
      Final Table[Visit or not] = "Visited",
      Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated"
    ),
    CALCULATE(
      DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
      Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated"
    )
  ) * 100
)

coverage_by_tl.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[TL],
  FILTER(Final Table, Final Table[TL] <> "No TL"),
  "Coverage %", DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Visit or not] = "Visited", Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated"),
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated")
  ) * 100,
  "Visited Count", CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Visit or not] = "Visited", Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated"),
  "Allocated Count", CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated")
)
ORDER BY [Coverage %] DESC

visit_intensity_by_bucket.description: Average visit intensity by Op bucket
visit_intensity_by_bucket.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Op bucket],
  "Avg Visits per Customer", DIVIDE(
    SUM(Final Table[Visit Count]),
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
  ),
  "Total Visits", SUM(Final Table[Visit Count]),
  "Customer Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
)

npa_by_region.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Region],
  FILTER(Final Table, Final Table[Op bucket] = "NPA"),
  "NPA Loan Count", COUNT(Final Table[loanappno]),
  "NPA Customer Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]),
  "NPA Outstanding", SUM(Final Table[bal_prin])
)
ORDER BY [NPA Loan Count] DESC

add_npa_by_region.description: New NPA additions (Add NPA = 1) by region
add_npa_by_region.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Region],
  FILTER(Final Table, Final Table[Add NPA] = 1),
  "New NPA Count", COUNT(Final Table[loanappno])
)
ORDER BY [New NPA Count] DESC

portfolio_outstanding_by_bucket.description: Total bal_prin and TOD by Op bucket
portfolio_outstanding_by_bucket.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Op bucket],
  "Balance Principal", SUM(Final Table[bal_prin]),
  "Total Overdue", SUM(Final Table[TOD]),
  "Loan Count", COUNT(Final Table[loanappno])
)

digital_cash_by_mob.description: Payment channel (Digital vs Cash) by MOB bucket
digital_cash_by_mob.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[MOB Bucket],
  Final Table[Digital/cash],
  FILTER(Final Table, NOT ISBLANK(Final Table[Digital/cash])),
  "Customer Count", DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
)

dpd_distribution.description: DPD distribution across portfolio for KDE/histogram
dpd_distribution.dax:
EVALUATE
SELECTCOLUMNS(
  Final Table,
  "dpd_casewise", Final Table[dpd_casewise],
  "Op bucket", Final Table[Op bucket],
  "Branch", Final Table[Branch],
  "Region", Final Table[Region]
)
ORDER BY Final Table[dpd_casewise]

fe_scorecard.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  Final Table[Allocation 1],
  Final Table[TL],
  FILTER(Final Table, Final Table[Allocation 1] <> "NA"),
  "Resolution %", DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Cust wise status] = "Norm"),
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])
  ) * 100,
  "Coverage %", DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Visit or not] = "Visited", Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated"),
    CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated")
  ) * 100,
  "Intensity", DIVIDE(SUM(Final Table[Visit Count]), DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID])),
  "Allocated Count", CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT(Final Table[Cust ID]), Final Table[Allocated or not] = "Allocated")
)

filter_snippets._note: Add these inside CALCULATE or as FILTER arguments in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS
